allow: Bash(echo "API_PID=$!" sleep 4 echo "---health---" curl -s -m 3 http://localhost:8787/health echo echo "---models---" curl -s -m 3 http://localhost:8787/v1/chat/models)

Bash(echo "WEB_PID=$!" sleep 10 echo "---root---" curl -s -m 5 -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} \(%{size_download} bytes\)\\n" http://localhost:3000/ echo "---login---" curl -s -m 5 -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:3000/login echo "---signup---" curl -s -m 5 -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:3000/signup echo "---log tail---" tail -8 /tmp/web.log)
